---
title: "Class assignments"
---

In-class problem sets with interactive notebooks. Due dates come from the current term
[syllabus](syllabus.qmd).

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED CLASS ASSIGNMENTS -->
## Class assignments

### Hypothesis Testing Assignment

_Assignment explanation coming soon._

- **Related lecture:** [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/presentation.html)
- **Notebook** — [notebook](../content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.ipynb)
- **Due:** Week 3
- **Estimated time:** 120 minutes
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED CLASS ASSIGNMENTS -->
